summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: Social Share buttons on Fundraising page, Teammate Signup 2-part flow, and Enhanced Team Page with leader controls. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/teams/invite/KEF2024A returns team info with members_count
GET /api/teams/invite/INVALID123 returns 404
DELETE /api/teams/members/{member_id} - leader cannot remove self (400)
DELETE /api/teams/members/{member_id} - non-leader cannot remove (403)
DELETE /api/teams/members/nonexistent - returns 404
DELETE /api/teams/members - requires authentication (401)
GET /api/teams/my - includes leader object with display_name
GET /api/teams/my - includes avg_progress_pct field
GET /api/teams/my - members have progress_pct, is_leader, total_km, total_raised
GET /api/teams/my - members have challenge info
GET /api/challenges returns 3 active challenges
GET /api/walker-types returns Basic/Builder/Leader pricing
GET /api/achievement-levels returns 5 achievement levels
GET /api/fundraising/{user_id} returns walker data for share buttons
Teammate signup flow - signup and join team works end-to-end
Fundraising page displays all 6 share buttons (Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Email, Copy)
Copy link button shows success toast
Teammate signup Part 1 - shows team name, tagline, member count, 2-step wizard
Teammate signup Part 1 - has Full Name, Display Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password fields
Teammate signup Part 1 - Login toggle works (switches between signup/login)
Teammate signup Part 2 - shows 'Joined!' badge on team info banner
Teammate signup Part 2 - shows 3 challenge options
Teammate signup Part 2 - shows 3 walker types (Basic $25, Builder $97, Leader $250)
Teammate signup Part 2 - shows Achievement Levels table with 5 levels
Teammate signup Part 2 - Invite Supporters section marked 'Optional'
Teammate signup Part 2 - Your Fundraising Page link with copy button
Teammate signup Part 2 - Pay button with correct price (Pay $25 & Start Walking)
Team page - 'Team Leader' badge displayed for leader
Team page - 'Led by [name]' subtitle displayed
Team page - 'Invite Members' button visible for leader only
Team page - 'Avg Completion' stat displayed (9.3%)
Team page - Members show progress bars with percentage
Team page - Leader row has 'Leader' badge, no trash icon
Team page - Non-leader rows have trash icons for removal
Team page - 5 remove member buttons found for non-leaders
seed_data_creation: Multiple test teammate accounts created during Playwright testing with TEST_ prefix

mocked_features.payment: Payment is mocked - 'Pay & Start Walking' button marks user as paid without real charge

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Share buttons on /fundraise/{user_id} page include Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Email, Copy buttons with toast on copy. 2) Teammate signup at /teams/join/{inviteCode} has 2-part flow - Part 1: account creation with login toggle, Part 2: challenge/walker type selection, achievement levels table, optional supporter invites, fundraising link, mock payment. 3) Team page (/team) shows leader badge, 'Led by' subtitle, Avg Completion %, member progress bars with %, and trash icons for leader to remove non-leader members. DELETE /api/teams/members/{member_id} endpoint working with proper authorization checks.
